prompt.content:
From the provider summary for top 100 DRGs data, the focus for HappyHospital is on 7 states only: IL, IN, MI, MN, MO, OH, and WI. 

Strain & Co has also decided to focus on only these 3 DRGs: 
057 - DEGENERATIVE NERVOUS SYSTEM DISORDERS W/O MCC, 
064 - INTRACRANIAL HEMORRHAGE OR CEREBRAL INFARCTION W MCC, and 
065 - INTRACRANIAL HEMORRHAGE OR CEREBRAL INFARCTION W CC. 

Use the information in these focus areas to answer the following questions:
1.  Which of the 7 focus states has the lowest average “Total Discharges”  in "065 - INTRACRANIAL HEMORRHAGE OR CEREBRAL INFARCTION W CC" DRG alone?
2. What is the Provider Name with the highest “Average Total Payments” for the 3 DRGs of focus in the 7 states?
3. Assuming the engagement manager at Strain & Co. decides to focus on only 6 states (IL, IN, MI, MN, MO, and OH) and takes out the first 57 lowest " Average Total Payments"  for the 3 DRGs in focus, what would be the average of the remaining "Average Total Payments" across the 6 states only? Round to two decimal places in dollar value.

Respond in the message console. Round all values to two decimal places

messages.content: States that the state with the lowest average Total Discharges  in "065 - INTRACRANIAL HEMORRHAGE OR CEREBRAL INFARCTION W CC" DRG is Wisconsin.

messages.content: States that the Provider Name with the highest Average Total Payments is UNIVERSITY OF ILLINOIS HOSPITAL.

rubrics.name: States that the average of the remaining Average Total Payments for the 6... (ver_f0801d7395c845bbaa0b7ec11ac8e4aa)

messages.content: States that the average of the remaining Average Total Payments for the 6 states is $8,956.37 (acceptable range $8,866.81 to $9,045.93).

rubrics.name: States that the average of the remaining Average Total Payments for the 6... (ver_f0801d7395c845bbaa0b7ec11ac8e4aa)

messages.content: States that the average of the remaining Average Total Payments for the 6 states is a value other than $8,956.37.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1. State with the lowest average Total Discharges  in "065 - INTRACRANIAL HEMORRHAGE OR CEREBRAL INFARCTION W CC" DRG is Wisconsin.

2. Provider name with the highest Average Total Payments is UNIVERSITY OF ILLINOIS HOSPITAL

3.  Average of the remaining Average Total Payments for the 6 states is $8,956.37
